prose:
**Acrolein Fukui reactivity — computed result.**

**Method/provenance:** Fukui functions from Mulliken charges using DFT **B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, tier `standard`, **gas phase** (`solvent: null`), charge 0, multiplicity 1. The N−1 cation and N+1 anion states were computed with charge +1/multiplicity 2 and charge −1/multiplicity 2, respectively. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz` (8 atoms). Backend reported: `program: dft`; Mulliken charges from PySCF. Density fitting was not requested.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom **4** (1-based), **C**, with **f+ = 0.64232102**.  
Most nucleophilic site = atom **1** (1-based), **O**, with **f− = 0.39388616**.

Per-atom results, in input atom order:

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.40136419 | 0.39388616 | 0.39762517 | 0.0074780351 |
| 2 | C | 0.022255105 | 0.0059884353 | 0.01412177 | 0.01626667 |
| 3 | C | 0.43404673 | 0.091403097 | 0.26272491 | 0.34264363 |
| 4 | C | 0.64232102 | 0.087369815 | 0.36484542 | 0.5549512 |
| 5 | H | -0.1572595 | 0.085961423 | -0.03564904 | -0.24322092 |
| 6 | H | -0.2072029 | 0.1856796 | -0.010761648 | -0.39288251 |
| 7 | H | -0.062116996 | 0.084485809 | 0.011184406 | -0.14660281 |
| 8 | H | -0.073407645 | 0.065225658 | -0.004090993 | -0.1386333 |

**Integrity:** `integrity.trustworthy = true`; status `ok`. The tool result did not include a `warnings` array, so no warnings were reported by the tool. Integrity checks returned OK, including f+ and f− charge-conservation checks. Plot path returned: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-044451_acrolein_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.

**Reproducibility:** Returned CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpj8dgl0as/live.json`. A live `.out` log path was not present in the raw tool result, so I cannot report one without fabricating it.
